headline: Travelers Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Lower Catastrophe Losses
summary: TRV tops Q2 earnings estimates as lower catastrophe losses, stronger investment income and underwriting gains lift profits despite a revenue miss.

headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Research Further and 2 We Turn Down
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

raw.headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Research Further and 2 We Turn Down
raw.summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

headline: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp WR Berkley Expectations Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) to release Q2 earnings on July 20, with expected EPS of $1.08 and revenue of $3.2B.
